summary: Implemented text-based taskbar overlay icon that displays the actual percentage number (e.g., '75%') using a custom bitmap font renderer with 3x5 pixel digits scaled 3x for visibility.
features_added: Bitmap font renderer for digits 0-9 and % symbol
Text-based overlay icon showing actual percentage
Color-coded text based on usage level (green/yellow/red)
Scaled 3x for better visibility on 32x32 overlay icon
next_steps: Run npm run start to test the text overlay
Verify percentage displays correctly on taskbar
